stories.title: 🤗 Trending: meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The story highlights the trending status of Meta-Llama-3-8B on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
It is categorized under key NLP/ML tags including 'transformers' and 'llama'.
The primary use case demonstrated is 'text-generation' within the AI ecosystem.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The content highlights the Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct model from Meta.
It is presented within the Hugging Face Benchmarks ecosystem, indicating community interest and availability.
The tags confirm its relevance to transformer models and text generation tasks.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: bigscience/bloom
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The story highlights the 'bigscience/bloom' model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
It pertains to the text-generation pipeline, indicating a focus on large language model capabilities.
The associated tags (transformers, pytorch, safetensors) confirm its relevance within the modern deep learning ecosystem.

stories.title: Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama, a popular tool for running local LLMs, has integrated MLX.
This integration enables faster performance specifically on Apple Silicon hardware.
The feature is currently available in a preview release.

stories.title: OpenClaw
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: OpenClaw is a personal AI assistant designed to integrate with messaging applications.
It utilizes local AI coding agents, ensuring all processing runs entirely on the user's device.
The core value proposition is providing private, on-device AI assistance for coding tasks.

stories.title: ollama launch
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama introduces a new command to simplify the setup and execution of coding tools.
It allows users to run various coding models (Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex) locally or in the cloud.
A key feature is its simplicity, requiring no environment variables or configuration files.

stories.title: OpenAI gpt-oss-safeguard
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama is integrating OpenAI's gpt-oss-safeguard reasoning models for safety classification tasks.
The models, available in 20B and 120B sizes, are being deployed through a partnership with OpenAI and ROOST.
The models are released under the permissive Apache 2.0 license, promoting open-source safety tooling.

stories.title: Four Russian satellites are now within striking distance of an ICEYE radarsat
stories.author: Stephen Clark
bullet_points: Russian satellites are reportedly close enough to threaten an ICEYE radarsat.
The capability described is noted as unusual for standard satellite missions.
The story touches upon geopolitical tensions involving advanced space technology.

stories.title: Evaluating Commercial AI Chatbots as News Intermediaries
stories.author: James Zou
bullet_points: The study systematically evaluates six major commercial AI chatbots (including Gemini, GPT-5, Claude, and Grok) on their factual accuracy.
It addresses a critical gap in research by measuring how these chatbots handle emerging facts across multiple languages and regions.
The evaluation used 2,100 factual questions derived from same-day BBC News reporting over a 14-day period.

stories.title: 🤗 Trending: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: The news highlights the trending status of the DeepSeek-R1 model on Hugging Face Benchmarks.
The model is categorized under text-generation and conversational AI pipelines.
It is associated with key technologies like transformers and safetensors.

stories.title: Image generation (experimental)
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama now offers experimental local image generation capabilities.
The feature is currently available for macOS users.
Support for Windows and Linux platforms is planned for future releases.

stories.title: Claude Code with Anthropic API compatibility
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama has integrated compatibility with the Anthropic Messages API.
This integration allows users to leverage powerful models like Claude Code within the Ollama ecosystem.
The feature bridges the gap between open-source local LLM deployment and proprietary API capabilities.

stories.title: OpenAI Codex with Ollama
stories.author: unknown
bullet_points: Ollama enables the use of OpenAI's Codex CLI with open-source models.
Codex, when integrated, can read, modify, and execute code within a user's directory.
The integration supports various open-weight alternatives, such as gpt-oss:20b and gpt-oss:120b.

stories.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
stories.author: Jay Peters
bullet_points: Google's new AI Overviews feature is currently exhibiting significant functional errors.
The AI has been observed providing irrelevant or unexpected responses, such as when searching for the term 'disregard'.
This highlights ongoing challenges and bugs in the deployment of large-scale generative AI search tools.

stories.title: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
stories.author: Stevie Bonifield
bullet_points: Meta is launching a new 'Forum' app to house Facebook Groups in a dedicated space.
The app integrates a dedicated AI chatbot, aiming to provide an in-app AI experience similar to Google AI Overviews.
This move represents a strategic effort by Meta to modernize its community features, referencing past app iterations.

stories.title: SpaceX's Starship V3—still a work in progress—mostly successful on first flight
stories.author: Stephen Clark
bullet_points: Starship V3 flight was deemed 'mostly successful' by SpaceX.
The vehicle is still considered a work in progress.
Full flight to low-Earth orbit remains a future goal for the program.

stories.title: US scrambles to stop Internet users re-creating dead pilots’ voices
stories.author: Jeremy Hsu
bullet_points: The story concerns the unauthorized recreation of deceased pilots' voices using technology.
The method employed circumvents existing legal restrictions regarding the disclosure of cockpit audio recordings by the NTSB.
It highlights the intersection of advanced voice synthesis/AI and aviation safety regulations.

stories.title: Reducing Political Manipulation with Consistency Training
stories.author: Dan Hendrycks
bullet_points: LLMs exhibit systematic and asymmetric political bias across sensitive contexts, termed 'covert political bias'.
The research identifies seven categories of techniques through which this covert political bias operates.
Two new metrics, Sentiment Consistency and Helpfulness Consistency, are proposed to quantify this bias.

stories.title: Understanding Data Temporality Impact on Large Language Models Pre-training
stories.author: Grave Edouard
bullet_points: Investigates how the temporal ordering of data impacts the knowledge acquisition of Large Language Models (LLMs).
Addresses the current limitation where LLMs, trained on shuffled data, lack proper temporal grounding.
Introduces a new benchmark comprising over 7,000 temporally grounded questions for evaluation.

stories.title: ChronoMedKG: A Temporally-Grounded Biomedical Knowledge Graph and Benchmark for Clinical Reasoning
stories.author: Richard Röttger
bullet_points: ChronoMedKG introduces a new biomedical knowledge graph designed to incorporate temporal information, addressing a limitation in existing static KGs.
The research highlights that temporal context (e.g., age of symptom onset) is critical for accurate longitudinal clinical reasoning, which current KGs fail to capture.
The development aims to improve the utility of KGs for advanced applications like clinical reasoning and retrieval augmentation in healthcare AI.

stories.title: AnyMo: Geometry-Aware Setup-Agnostic Modeling of Human Motion in the Wild
stories.author: Flora Salim
bullet_points: The research addresses the challenge of setup dependence in human motion sensing using wearable Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs).
The proposed method, AnyMo, aims to create geometry-aware and setup-agnostic models for human motion in real-world environments.
This advancement is crucial for enabling the broader, more robust application of wearable IMU data across different devices and datasets.

stories.title: AMEL: Accumulated Message Effects on LLM Judgments
stories.author: Sid-ali Temkit
bullet_points: The study investigates the 'Accumulated Message Effect on LLM Judgments' (AMEL), examining if prior conversation history biases subsequent evaluations by LLMs.
Research was conducted across 75,898 API calls using 11 models from four major providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and open-source models).
This research is relevant to the growing use of LLMs as automated evaluators for tasks like code review and content moderation.
